gold_change_reason: Scaled task adds requirements: parse complex equations (D-axis), include default_compartment='cytosol' (C-axis), handle missing YAML file gracefully (A-axis), and provide stronger verification coverage (V-axis). The new solution incorporates these while preserving the core parsing logic.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must verify that the solution correctly parses reactions with multi-word compounds, coefficients, and reversible arrows.
Scaled executable cases must verify that the parsed reactions include the compartment when default_compartment is specified.
Scaled executable cases must verify that the solution handles missing files gracefully without crashing, and prints appropriate error messages.
Scaled executable cases must provide stronger executable verification coverage for this operator.
implementation_notes: The parse_reaction_file function is defined with the same logic as the seed but is now robust to handle missing files (exceptions propagate to caller).
The main program includes error handling for missing YAML file to satisfy the A-axis requirement.
Sample files now include complex equations with coefficients, multiple compounds, and reversible arrows to satisfy D-axis.
default_compartment='cytosol' is passed to all parse calls, so each reaction dict includes a 'compartment' key.
The code is self-contained and executable as a standalone script.
